TOTAL FLIGHT MANAGEMENT INC.
Virtual Flight Operations * Teterboro, NJ * Est. 2026

A simulated Part 135 on-demand air carrier based at Teterboro, NJ. Certificate No. JDJZ2030 — operating Dassault Falcon 50 turbojet aircraft on virtual charter flights worldwide.

DISCLAIMER: Total Flight Management is a virtual organization of virtual pilots simulating flight operations using Microsoft Flight Simulator and X-Plane. It is an entirely fictitious hobby based organization, is not an FAA air carrier, does not own, manage or operate any aircraft, and provides no services in any way. This organization exists purely as an entertainment hobby for flight simulation enthusiasts.

© 2026 Total Flight Management Incorporated. Virtual Flight Operations. For simulation purposes only. Air Carrier Certificate No. JDJZ2030 * Teterboro FSDO

Safety & Standards

Safety is Never
Negotiable

Every TFM virtual operation mirrors real-world Part 135 standards. Our crews follow actual ATP procedures, CRM protocols, and instrument flight rules.

  • 01
    FAA Part 135 Procedures

    All operations follow real 14 CFR Part 135 protocols, OpSpecs, and GOM Rev 0.

  • 02
    ATP-Rated Virtual Crews

    Every PIC is trained to ATP standards with full type knowledge for the operated aircraft.

  • 03
    ATC Compliance

    All flights operated under positive ATC control where available, following real-world procedures.

About TFM

Aviation at the
Highest Standard

Total Flight Management Incorporated is a simulated Part 135 on-demand air carrier. Based at Teterboro Airport (KTEB), we operate Dassault Falcon 50 turbojet aircraft on virtual charter flights worldwide.

Our operations mirror real-world FAA Part 135 standards in every detail -- from dispatch procedures and flight releases, to crew qualifications and safety management. Certificate No. JDJZ2030, certificated by the Teterboro FSDO.

24/7
Ops Available
ATP
All Flight Crews
135
FAA Certified
KTEB
Home Base
Join TFM as a Virtual Pilot

We're looking for virtual pilots who take flight simulation seriously. No casual flying — TFM operates to real-world standards with proper flight planning, ATC contact, and professional conduct.

Requirements: Familiarity with IFR procedures * Willingness to fly turbojet aircraft per published procedures * Discord active

Operations Manual
General Operations Manual
Rev 0 · Effective May 24, 2026
32 pages · Part 135 On-Demand · Turbojet
Download GOM
Reference
Duty & Rest Limits
14 CFR 135.261-135.273 · On-Demand
Max flight time / 24hr8 hrs
Max flight time / 7 days34 hrs
Max flight time / 30 days120 hrs
Min rest period9 hrs
Reference
Weather Minimums
IFR Operations · GOM Section 6
Takeoff standard800-2
ILS / LPVDA as published
Non-precisionMDA as published
Alternate requiredBelow 2000-3
Reference
MEL Quick Reference
GOM Section 7.3 · Dispatch Limits
All MEL dispatch conditions and (O) and (M) procedures must be complied with fully. PIC has authority to ground aircraft when airworthiness is in question..
Simulator Integration
TFM SimBridge
MSFS & X-Plane · Live data + Auto-logbook
Node.js app · Runs locally on your PC
Download Setup Guide
Install: Unzip → open folder in terminal → npm install
MSFS: Start MSFS first, then npm run msfs
X-Plane: Set Data Output to 127.0.0.1:49002, then npm run xplane
Then: Open Crew Portal → click Connect MSFS or Connect X-Plane
